Musa was raised in the palace of Fir'awn after Allah inspired his mother to place him in the river.
Allah spoke to him directly at the blessed valley of Tuwa and sent him to Fir'awn with clear signs.
He led the Children of Israel out of Egypt; Allah split the sea for them and drowned Fir'awn.
Allah revealed the Tawrah to him on Mount Tur.
